context: Evaluates whether the agent uses `object.keys()` to get tag keys rather than a comprehension `{k | some k in obj}`, and uses set subtraction to find missing tags.

checklist.name: Uses `object.keys()` for provided tags
checklist.description: Provided tag keys are obtained with `object.keys(input.resource.tags)` — not with a comprehension like `{k | some k in input.resource.tags}`

checklist.name: Set subtraction for missing tags
checklist.description: Missing tags are computed with `required_tags - provided_tags` (set subtraction), not iteration

checklist.name: deny contains msg with sprintf
checklist.description: Violation uses `deny contains msg if { ... }` with `sprintf` listing the missing tags

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
